label: Drug policy entry
description: Per-drug scheduling rule inside a DrugPolicyDef. Controls whether a specific drug is allowed for addiction management, recreational joy, or automatic timed scheduling.

drug.label: Drug
drug.description: The ThingDef of the drug this entry controls.

allowedForAddiction.label: Allowed for addiction
allowedForAddiction.description: Allows taking this drug to satisfy an existing addiction.

allowedForJoy.label: Allowed for joy
allowedForJoy.description: Allows taking this drug for recreational joy.

allowScheduled.label: Allow scheduled
allowScheduled.description: Enables automatic timed scheduling for this drug. When true, activates daysFrequency, onlyIfMoodBelow, and onlyIfJoyBelow.

daysFrequency.label: Days frequency
daysFrequency.description: Minimum days between scheduled doses. Only meaningful when allowScheduled is true.

onlyIfMoodBelow.label: Only if mood below
onlyIfMoodBelow.description: Scheduled use fires only when pawn mood fraction is below this value (0-1). A value of 1.0 disables the mood gate.

onlyIfJoyBelow.label: Only if joy below
onlyIfJoyBelow.description: Scheduled use fires only when pawn joy fraction is below this value (0-1). A value of 1.0 disables the joy gate.

takeToInventory.label: Take to inventory
takeToInventory.description: Number of drug doses the pawn is directed to carry in inventory. 0 disables inventory stocking.
